subject: docs(session-notes): fix drift — updated discriminator + assertion count
body:
Two small doc-drift fixes caught in the final audit before merge:

- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md item 4 (usePWAUpdate hardening): was still
  showing the pre-refactor `checkForUpdates: Promise<'done' | ...>`
  return type. Updated to the post-refactor `'up-to-date' |
  'update-available' | ...` with a one-line rationale (the split
  dodges the stale-React-state race). Also removed the forward-looking
  "future Check for Updates UIs can dispatch..." since that UI now
  exists in SettingsModal (cross-ref to the `undone` pass).
- docs/SESSION_NOTES.md item 7 (Cross-pattern infrastructure): was
  saying "46 assertions" — actual count is 47 after the wrap-pass
  added marker-presence + parseable-array assertions to
  verify-inline-scripts.mjs.

Also re-committing public/version.json from the fresh-build verification
run, so deployed clients see a new buildTime and the PWA update path
correctly detects this commit as a new version.

Tags: docs, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
